hardness_axes.name: Discover
hardness_axes.reasoning: Solver must read staged versus live code paths, replay transcripts, and digest builders to learn which authority feeds surface checks versus durable promotion.

hardness_axes.name: Synthesize
hardness_axes.reasoning: Correctness couples journal ingest ordering, coordinator summaries, and verifier-facing digest materialization across replay windows.

hardness_axes.name: Diagnose or Design/Search
hardness_axes.reasoning: Repair shape with symptoms-only public prompt; root cause is which metadata generation trusts after resume boundaries.

hardness_axes.name: Navigate coupling
hardness_axes.reasoning: Patching only summaries or only tail replay leaves cross-generation contradictions that downstream harness tests catch.

hardness_axes.name: Reason beyond training
hardness_axes.reasoning: Failure mixes operational recovery semantics with staged bundle bookkeeping; not a single-algorithm textbook exercise.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Disclosure-collapse
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: After honest disclosure of commands, artifact shapes, and cross-window invariants, the solver still must align authorities and ordering logic across three subsystems.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Hidden-instance
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: No single corrupt file instance; defect is behavioral mismatch across phases and generations.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Single-artifact repair
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Flipping-point contract ties distinct roots; deleting one shadow file or checksum is insufficient.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Generalization
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Verifier spans multiple replay schedules and promotion tails, not one hard-coded scenario row.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Prompt-honesty
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Honest symptom description does not name the mistaken authority or cleanup ordering bug.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Cheating-vs-difficulty
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Hardness comes from coordination and diagnosis; anti-cheat is regenerating outputs through the shipped runner only.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Mechanical-fix filter
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Not verifier wiring or timeout tuning; behavior is product recovery semantics.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Localized-fix
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Three distributed modules per flipping contract; no one cluster satisfies majority of tests alone.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Oracle-locality
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Oracle will coordinate edits across roots with substantive behavioral changes, not one-file overwrite.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Small declarative-cluster
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Core bug is procedural interaction between replay, promotion, and digest selection, not a tiny literal table transcription.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Grep-collapse
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Instruction domain nouns are banned on fix-path symbols per construction manifest; neutral module layout resists prompt-to-file grep.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Pre-factored-helper
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Decoys perform adjacent non-fix work; fix helpers are opaque and not prompt-aligned verb names.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Recipe-discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Not a textbook safe-extract or policy-knob fill; requires reasoning about generation lineage and replay cutovers.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Security-aura discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Residual work is storage and recovery correctness, not credential theatrics.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Orthogonal-checklist
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Promotion summaries, replay ordering, and digest choice trade off; partial fixes fail coupled invariants.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Harness-discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Docker supplies runtime but difficulty is code-level authority confusion, not container novelty.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: One-pass solvability
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Requires instrumented multi-phase runs and cross-checking disagreeing surfaces before editing.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Hard-only gate
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Construction plan targets Edition-2 hard bar with observation contract, flipping points, and replay idempotence traps.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Discovery/design budget test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: discovery_budget lists three non-trivial discoveries tied to env modules the instruction must not spell out as recipes.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Instruction specificity test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: repair_existing_system with symptoms-only level; no spec-complete recipe in the planned prompt.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Topology distribution test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: topology_enumeration gives three fix topologies each spanning three coordinated loci without a single sufficient component.

rubric_axes.name: Verifiable
rubric_axes.reasoning: Deterministic replay harness, regenerated JSON transcripts, and pytest assertions on derived records.

rubric_axes.name: Well-specified
rubric_axes.reasoning: Public contract names command, artifact paths, cross-window invariants, and negative controls without oracle triples.

rubric_axes.name: Solvable
rubric_axes.reasoning: Expert can diagnose authority skew and adjust ordering or source selection within a bounded Python codebase.

rubric_axes.name: Difficult
rubric_axes.reasoning: Competent agents must integrate replay, promotion, and digest surfaces under honest disclosure.

rubric_axes.name: Interesting
rubric_axes.reasoning: Mirrors real image-builder and firmware staging incidents where late generations disagree with early probes.

rubric_axes.name: Outcome-verified
rubric_axes.reasoning: Grades regenerated artifacts and invariants, not narrative of steps taken.

instruction_completeness_test.reasoning: Symptoms and contract live in instruction; which subsystem wrongly trusts shadow summaries versus canonical digests must be learned from code and traces.

discovery_budget.discovery: Which on-disk generation token the coordinator treats as authoritative when replay truncates mid-window versus when it completes.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Naming the mistaken branch collapses diagnosis to a one-line guard.

discovery_budget.discovery: How tail replay reorders durable lineage updates relative to cleanup hooks that rewrite sidecar summaries.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Stating replay interleaving explicitly becomes the patch recipe.

discovery_budget.discovery: Where digest builders choose reconstructed summaries instead of canonical artifact bytes for verifier-visible material.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Reveals the exact mistaken comparison surface and trivializes to swapping one call site.

instruction_specificity.reasoning: Public prompt describes intermittent agreement then late drift across replay windows without naming broken functions or ordering tables.

attack_path.summary: Models may trust whichever digest or summary first agrees with surface probes, skip tail replay coupling, or flush summaries without fixing canonical selection.
attack_path.reasoning: Each shortcut leaves a distinct failing observation in the regenerated transcript under multi-phase harness runs.

smallest_plausible_patch.summary: Tighten authority selection so replay boundaries and promotion phases read the same canonical lineage inputs when building verifier-facing digests and coordinator summaries.
smallest_plausible_patch.reasoning: Sounds localized but flipping contract forces coordinated behavior across ingest, coordinator, and digest builder with partial-revert traps.

collapse_audit.reasoning: Post-disclosure work remains integration of replay ordering, promotion bookkeeping, and digest provenance—not one-function mapping.
collapse_audit.residual_hardness: Solver must align generation-scoped metadata with replay-truncated windows while keeping idempotent reruns and regenerated transcripts consistent.

topology_enumeration.summary: Fix via journal ingest prioritizing canonical bytes over reconstructed summaries during replay.
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Ingest alone cannot repair coordinator summaries that already cached wrong lineage; tail replay still reintroduces skew without tail changes.

topology_enumeration.summary: Fix via coordinator emission path that refreshes summaries from durable lineage after cleanup windows.
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Emitting summaries from corrected lineage still fails if digest builders read a different shadow slice during verification phases.

topology_enumeration.summary: Fix via digest builder choosing verifier-visible hashes tied to canonical artifacts rather than short-lived summaries.
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Digest correctness without replay-order repair still mutates evidence before validation in destructive replay steps.

symbol_table.purpose: Builds digest-facing records from mixed inputs before promotion.
Merges coordinator-visible slices after partial replay.
Applies tail replay mutations and cleanup side effects.

decoy_manifest.non_fix_purpose: Prunes unrelated scratch slices for unrelated diagnostics.
Maintains cold-cache mirrors that never feed the verifier path.
Pads tail records for archival exports not consulted by tests.

renames_during_drafting.reason: Former name contained digest stem overlapping instruction token digests.

difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: Early probes agree while later promotion phases expose stale coordinator slices.
difficulty_mechanism_plan.fairness_guardrail: Instruction states the observable two-phase disagreement without naming the branch mistake.

difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: Tail replay mutates evidence used by later validation unless ordering is coordinated.
difficulty_mechanism_plan.fairness_guardrail: Deterministic injected schedules and idempotent rerun checks remove flake.

difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: Locally consistent summaries disagree with canonical artifact bytes.
difficulty_mechanism_plan.fairness_guardrail: Both surfaces are visible in-repo; solver chooses correct authority from behavior.

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: JSON transcripts plus on-disk fixture bytes cross-checked in tests
difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: Digest chain must align bytes, coordinator entries, and tail replay markers simultaneously.
difficulty_mechanism_plan.fairness_guardrail: contract.md defines cross-format checks referenced by instruction.

difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: Later phases depend on mutated state from earlier replay and cleanup windows.
difficulty_mechanism_plan.fairness_guardrail: Harness exposes deterministic phase labels in transcripts for debugging.

calibration_plan.human_sanity: Engineer with recovery background can trace two disagreeing authorities in under two hours given repo access.
calibration_plan.shortcut_audit: Watch for static JSON paste, test-only_digest math, broad env wipe shortcuts, or wrapper-only edits that break regeneration checks.
calibration_plan.ablation_plan: Drop tail replay coupling, drop digest authority swap, or freeze coordinator summaries and expect pass rates to rise toward easy while breaking subsets.

pass_rate_target.basis: stronger target agent on this harness class

metrics.criterion: Transcript entries match contract.md digest and promotion rules across phases.
Cross-window lineage and tail replay markers stay coherent under reruns.
Regenerated outputs pick up fixes; no stale hand-written transcripts survive deletion.
CLI entrypoints and paths remain stable for the harness command.
reward.txt present with binary scoring semantics unchanged.

verifier_scoring_plan.binary_threshold_rule: reward is 1 only when every pytest case passes after fresh transcript regeneration.

subtype_milestone_plan.sidecar_or_protocol_notes: Fixtures bundled under environment/studio/app/data; no network or external APIs.

task_files.role: ships repro command and regenerates observation transcript

fix_frontier.distribution: environment/wal_slots for digest builder, environment/co_emitters for coordinator merge, environment/journal_tail for tail replay application.
fix_frontier.naming_policy: Opaque fix-path symbols and neutral directory names; instruction domain nouns forbidden on fix-path code tokens per construction manifest.
fix_frontier.helpers_policy: Decoys and studio helpers do adjacent archival or diagnostic work without satisfying verifier invariants alone.

task_shape.collapse_risk: Naming the restore boundary, trusted digest file, or cleanup phase ordering too directly reduces work to a tiny guard or config patch.

category_profile.allowed_instruction_disclosures: Crash/restart and replay workflows, durability expectations, recovery command, regenerated transcript path, cross-window invariants, idempotent rerun rule, and negative controls for static writes.
category_profile.forbidden_instruction_leaks: Journal layout details, exact cleanup hook ordering, shadow-versus-canonical file names, fix-path symbols, or patch recipe.
category_profile.category_specific_hardness_bar: Partial writes, replay, cleanup, and rerun safety must coordinate; no single stale file deletion suffices.
category_profile.category_specific_verifier_risks: Hidden snapshot expectations, ordering-flaky harness, verifier coupling to private fields.
category_profile.coverage_role: Adds a generation-confusion variant under recovery profile distinct from pure crash journaling tasks.

satisfiability_risk.rc2_planned_name_risk: low — neutral roots and opaque symbols with noun ban on fix path.
satisfiability_risk.gx9_contract_risk: low — instruction avoids enumerating per-scenario expected field triples; tests derive from transcripts.
satisfiability_risk.cr1_symbol_frontier_risk: medium — three functions are the declared frontier; keep bodies thin helpers in sibling files.
satisfiability_risk.hidden_contract_risk: low — contract.md mirrors every tested field in solver-visible docs per actionability plan.

actionability_plan.verifier_command_visible: instruction names the shipped python module command used in tests to regenerate the transcript.
actionability_plan.source_fix_intent_visible: instruction states fixes must live under /app/environment and flow through the runner, not hand-written outputs.
actionability_plan.exact_formula_home: digest distance and window overlap rules live in environment/studio/app/docs/contract.md and are cited from instruction at a high level without copying scenario tables.
actionability_plan.schema_home: top-level transcript schema documented in contract.md and mirrored in instruction prose shape.

waiver_plan.waiver_rationale: Synthetic but grounded profile; construction targets mechanical gates without checker false positives.

realism_source.evidence_basis: synthesized goal-sized Option B survivor seed described in Step-1 intake (no upstream ticket attached).
realism_source.upstream_or_synthetic_rationale: Compresses recurring industry incidents where staging probes agree while promotion-time digests disagree after replay-heavy maintenance.
realism_source.minimization_preserves: Multi-authority confusion, destructive replay windows, and late-generation divergence without tying to a proprietary vendor tree.
realism_source.synthetic_exception_review: Category profile state_recovery_crash_consistency chosen; observation-shaped outputs avoid boolean verdict fields; actionability places formulas in visible contract.md; extra scrutiny on decoys so they perform real non-fix work; waivers not anticipated.
